channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Israel Strikes Beirut After Hezbollah Attack, Risking Iran Response
item.description: Israel struck Beirut's southern suburbs in retaliation for a Hezbollah missile attack on northern Israel, raising the risk of an Iranian response.

item.title: Iran launches missiles at Israel for first time since ceasefire
item.description: Iran fired missiles at Israel on Sunday in retaliation for an Israeli strike in Beirut earlier that day, Israeli officials reported.

item.title: GOP redistricting means Democrats need nearly 2 more points to win the House
item.description: Data shows the additional Democratic vote share needed per district to reach 218 seats. Alabama's redistricting case remains under appeal.

item.title: 5 key moments from Trump's cut-short "Meet the Press" interview
item.description: President Trump ended a wide-ranging "Meet the Press" interview abruptly on Sunday after discussing potential payouts for those prosecuted over Jan. 6.
